'''valofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:eye|eye]]". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-l-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eye|eye]]
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| valofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vælefeth|vælefeth]] || [[word:vælefej|vælefej]] || [[word:vælefesh|vælefesh]] || [[word:vælefe|vælefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:valolofoth|valolofoth]] || [[word:valolofoj|valolofoj]] || [[word:valolofosh|valolofosh]] || [[word:valolofo|valolofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:valofoth|valofoth]] || [[word:valofoj|valofoj]] || [[word:valofosh|valofosh]] || [[word:valofo|valofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:valoffoth|valoffoth]] || [[word:valoffoj|valoffoj]] || [[word:valoffosh|valoffosh]] || [[word:valoffof|valoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:valofotho|valofotho]] || [[word:valofojo|valofojo]] || [[word:valofosho|valofosho]] || [[word:valofoko|valofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:valofoth|valofoth]] || [[word:valofoj|valofoj]] || [[word:valofosh|valofosh]] || [[word:valofo|valofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:valofothol|valofothol]] || [[word:valofojol|valofojol]] || [[word:valofoshol|valofoshol]] || [[word:valofokol|valofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:valofothotho|valofothotho]] || [[word:valofojojo|valofojojo]] || [[word:valofoshosho|valofoshosho]] || [[word:valofoko|valofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:valofothon|valofothon]] || [[word:valofojon|valofojon]] || [[word:valofoshon|valofoshon]] || [[word:valofokon|valofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:valofothoro|valofothoro]] || [[word:valofojoro|valofojoro]] || [[word:valofoshoro|valofoshoro]] || [[word:valofokoro|valofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
